indications.text:
LEXXEL is indicated for the treatment of hypertension.
This fixed combination drug is not indicated for the initial therapy of hypertension. (See DOSAGE
AND ADMINISTRATION.)
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/drugsatfd...
